content:
Test Plan – Manual Testing for Zero Bank Project
1. Project Name:
Zero Bank Manual Testing
2. Objective / Purpose:
To ensure the core banking features of the Zero Bank website (http://zero.webappsecurity.com/) work as expected under valid and invalid user inputs, and to identify and report defects for resolution.
3. Scope of Testing:
In Scope:
Login/Logout functionality
Account summary viewing
Transfer Funds
Feedback submission
4. Testing Type:
Manual Testing
Functional Testing
Smoke
5. Test Environment:
Browser: Chrome v134+,
OS: Windows 10
Site URL: http://zero.webappsecurity.com
6. Test Deliverables:
Test Plan
Test Scenarios
Test Cases
RTM (Requirement Traceability Matrix)
Defect Report / Bug Report
Final Test Summary Report
7. Entry Criteria:
Application is deployed and stable
Requirements and functionalities are understood
Test cases are reviewed
8. Exit Criteria:
All critical test cases executed
All major bugs resolved
RTM is fully covered
Test summary report submitted
9. Test Schedule (Timeline):

[START_TABLE_CONTENT] | Phase | Duration |
| --- | --- |
| Requirement Review | Day 1 |
| Test Case Design | Day 2 – Day 3 |
| Test Execution | Day 4 – Day 6 |
| Bug Reporting/Retest | Day 5 – Day 6 |
| Final Reporting | Day 7 | [END_TABLE_CONTENT]

10. Roles and Responsibilities:

[START_TABLE_CONTENT] | Role | Name | Responsibility |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Test Lead | Tanay Puranik | Create plan, monitor progress |
| Tester | Tanay Puranik | Design, execute, report bugs | [END_TABLE_CONTENT]

11. Risks & Mitigation:

[START_TABLE_CONTENT] | Risk | Mitigation |
| --- | --- |
| Limited testing time | Prioritize critical test cases | [END_TABLE_CONTENT]

12. Tools Used:
Jira (for story/bug tracking and timeline)
Excel (for Test Cases, RTM)
